tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly elevated LDL cholesterol (103 mg/dL; upper limit 100 mg/dL). Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile are otherwise unremarkable. Recommend monitoring LDL and considering lifestyle modification or further cardiovascular risk assessment as appropriate. No acute laboratory concerns.

text.div: Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
